commentaries.author: Eusebius of Caesarea
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Even everyone that is called by my name: for I have created him for my glory, I have formed him; yea, I have made him. Eusebius of Caesarea If it is necessary for some to be marked by name, then I will make it clear to them all that they are now “those who have been called by my name. ” From where else did the name of Christians come than from the name of Christ. For it was he who foretold such a thing through the prophet.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Calleth. Hebrew, "is called by my name. "(Protestants) (Haydock)
My people's chastisements and liberation prove my divine perfections.

commentaries.author: The Didache
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Even everyone that is called by my name: for I have created him for my glory, I have formed him; yea, I have made him. You, almighty Master, created all things for your name’s sake and gave food and drink to people to enjoy, that they might give you thanks; but to us you have graciously given spiritual food and drink and eternal life through your servant. Above all we give thanks because you are mighty; to you be the glory forever.
